overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a character walking through a neon-lit city at night. The journey moves from a dark underpass through streets with illuminated cherry blossoms and ends in a covered market plaza with hanging red lanterns. The environment features wet reflective streets, futuristic vehicles, and dense neon signage with a hazy atmospheric perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under concrete overpass

events.description: futuristic sedan with headlights on passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk under the overpass, following a pedestrian carrying an illuminated umbrella

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a red illuminated umbrella
futuristic black sedan driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the street with industrial beams and dark ceiling
large floating holographic advertisement with blue and purple neon colors
thick cylindrical support columns for the overpass structure
wet pavement reflecting the neon lights with mirror-like quality

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass in a futuristic city. The camera follows a character walking along a wet reflective sidewalk, with neon holographic advertisements visible in the distance. A futuristic sedan passes by on the right, and a pedestrian with an illuminated umbrella walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with illuminated cherry blossom trees

events.description: exits the covered underpass into the open street with visible sky and illuminated trees
passing illuminated cherry blossom trees with purple and pink lights lining the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk past illuminated cherry trees and various pedestrians in a bustling commercial area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction alongside the camera
pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: trees with illuminated purple and pink blossoms lining the left side of the sidewalk
large blue and red advertisement billboard for Circus Cola with white text
tall buildings with neon signage and glass facades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into an open commercial street lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees emitting purple light. The environment is bustling with pedestrians, and a large Circus Cola billboard dominates the right side of the view. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under building overpass with neon lighting

events.description: crossing the street and entering another covered section under a building overpass
multiple futuristic vehicles including a sports car passing by in the covered roadway

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing under the covered roadway, navigating around other pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange top and red pants walking in the same direction under the overpass
futuristic sports car driving through the covered street with headlights on

entered.detail: low concrete overpass covering the roadway with linear ceiling lights
bright pink and blue neon signs mounted on the building walls
futuristic cars parked along the curb under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and enters another covered section under a building overpass. The area features bright neon wall signs and parked futuristic vehicles along the curb. Multiple vehicles drive through the covered roadway, and pedestrians navigate the sidewalk under the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market plaza with glass roof and hanging red lanterns

events.description: entering the covered market plaza with glass ceiling structure and hanging red lanterns
approaching food stalls with steam, vendors, and illuminated merchandise displays

agents.ego_description: entering the market plaza and walking past food stalls and vendors under the glass and metal roof structure

notable_agents.action: market vendor standing behind a food stall with steam rising
pedestrian browsing the market stalls and looking at merchandise

entered.detail: large covered plaza with geometric glass and metal roof structure allowing some sky visibility
numerous red paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling in clusters
row of food stalls with steam, neon lighting, and vendors selling goods
large neon sign reading Cherry Blossom Market above the entrance
large tree with purple illuminated blossoms inside the plaza center

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered market plaza with a geometric glass roof and clusters of red hanging paper lanterns. The area features food stalls with steam and neon lighting, vendors, and a large illuminated cherry blossom tree in the center. The environment transitions from the roadway to a pedestrian-only market space with vending machines and browsing shoppers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district and finally into a festive covered market. It begins beneath a concrete overpass, following a character along a wet, reflective sidewalk past holographic advertisements and a passing futuristic sedan. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bustling street lined with purple-illuminated cherry blossom trees and a towering Circus Cola billboard. The camera then tracks the character across the street and under another building overpass filled with bright neon wall signs and flowing traffic before turning toward a pedestrian-only plaza. Finally, the environment shifts into a market space under a geometric glass roof, where steam rises from food stalls and red paper lanterns hang around a central illuminated cherry blossom tree.
